fixture_purpose: Test fixture for verifying goal-adaptive quiz selection for competitive_exam students. NOT a production seed. Sample of 3 real public-domain JEE Main 2024 questions used by integration tests to assert that a competitive_exam goal student receives JEE-level questions when ff_goal_aware_selection is enabled.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question_text: A block of mass 2 kg is placed on a horizontal surface. A force of 10 N is applied at 60 degrees above the horizontal. If the coefficient of friction is 0.2, the acceleration of the block is (g = 10 m/s²)

questions.subject: physics
questions.question_text: A solid sphere of mass M and radius R rolls without slipping down an inclined plane of angle theta. The acceleration of its center of mass is

questions.subject: physics
questions.question_text: The work function of a metal is 2 eV. Light of wavelength 400 nm is incident on it. The maximum kinetic energy of emitted electrons is (hc = 1240 eV nm)
